Let me revert the Makefile.depend change and try a different approach:

ACTION: EDIT_FILE usr.bin/enigma/Makefile.depend
OLD:
<<<

	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \
	lib/libcrypt \

>>>
NEW:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \
	lib/libcrypt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif
>>>
